title: $18+ Bn Sports Fishing Equipment Markets - Global Forecasts 2025-2032
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global sports fishing equipment market is projected to grow from USD 12.83 billion in 2025 to USD 18.04 billion by 2032, with a CAGAT of 4.98%. Growth is driven by product innovation, changing consumer preferences toward high-performance and sustainable products, and supply chain resilience strategies. Key opportunities include digital channel expansion and regional growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a major competitor in the growing sports fishing equipment market with positive market projections and emphasis on product innovation opportunities.

title: Angling & Hunting Equipment Market Report - Global Forecast 2026-2032
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global angling and hunting equipment market is projected to grow from USD 683.83 million in 2025 to USD 1.16 billion by 2032, with a CAGR of 7.87%. Growth is driven by product innovation, e-commerce expansion, supply chain resilience, and evolving consumer preferences for sustainability and performance. Companies must adapt to tariff challenges, regional regulatory variations, and digital transformation of distribution channels.
